zh.lifeSummary: 當Andre de Montbard, 5th Grand Master of the Knights Templar於1097年11月5日出生在法國布格時，他的父親Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard57歲，母親Humberge de Roucy49歲。他和Helvide de Montreal至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他於1152年登記服兵役。他去世於1156年1月17日在以色列מחוז ירושלים享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andre de Montbard, 5th Grand Master of the Knights Templar于1097年11月5日出生在法国布格时，他的父亲Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard57岁，母亲Humberge de Roucy49岁。他和Helvide de Montreal至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他于1152年登记服兵役。他去世于1156年1月17日在以色列מחוז ירושלים享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Andre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Andrew  , now also used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Andre de Montbard, 5th Grand Master of the Knights Templar was born on 5 November 1097, in Burgundy, France, his father, Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard, was 57 and his mother, Humberge de Roucy, was 49. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Helvide de Montreal. He registered for military service in 1152. He died on 17 January 1156, in Jerusalem, Israel, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andre de Montbard, 5th Grand Master of the Knights Templar est né le 5 novembre 1097, à Bourgogne, France, son père, Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Humberge de Roucy, avait 49 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Helvide de Montreal. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1152. Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1156, à Jerusalem, Israël, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andre de Montbard, 5th Grand Master of the Knights Templar am 5. November 1097 in Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard 57 und seine Mutter Humberge de Roucy 49. Er hatte mit Helvide de Montreal mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1152 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 17. Januar 1156 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Jerusalem, Israel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andre de Montbard, 5th Grand Master of the Knights Templar è nato il il 5 novembre 1097 nel Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Humberge de Roucy, aveva 49 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Helvide de Montreal. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1152. Morì il 17 gennaio 1156, nel Jerusalem, Israele, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Andre de Montbard, 5th Grand Master of the Knights Templarが1097年11月5日にフランスボウルゴグンで生まれた時，父Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbardは57歳，母Humberge de Roucyは49歳であった。彼はHelvide de Montrealとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1152年に兵役登録をした。彼は1156年1月17日にイスラエルמחוז ירושליםで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Andre de Montbard, 5th Grand Master of the Knights Templar(이)가 1097년 11월 5일 프랑스 부르고그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Humberge de Roucy(은)는 49세였다. 그는 Helvide de Montreal(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1152년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1156년 1월 17일 이스라엘 מחוז ירושלים에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andre de Montbard, 5th Grand Master of the Knights Templar nasceu em 5 de novembro de 1097, em Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Humberge de Roucy, tinha 49 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Helvide de Montreal. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1152. Ele faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1156, em Jerusalem, Israel, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andre de Montbard, 5th Grand Master of the Knights Templar родился 5 ноября 1097 г. в местности бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Humberge de Roucy, 49. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Helvide de Montreal. В 1152 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 17 января 1156 г. в местности מחוז ירושלים, Израиль в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andre de Montbard, 5th Grand Master of the Knights Templar nació el 5 de noviembre de 1097, en Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Humberge de Roucy, tenía 49 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Helvide de Montreal. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1152. Murió el 17 de enero de 1156, en Jerusalem, Israel, a la edad de 58 años.
